metadata.title: TEXNO CONSTRUCTION AZ MMC | Professional Construction Services
metadata.description: Reliable and quality construction and installation services in Azerbaijan. Expert in residential, administrative, industrial and commercial projects.

hero.title: Your Trusted Construction Partner
hero.subtitle: Professional construction and installation services, modern technologies and innovative solutions. We execute your projects safely, with high quality and on time.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We operate on the basis of professional approach, modern technologies and innovative solutions in the construction and installation sector

main_construction.title: Main construction and installation works
main_construction.description: Construction and installation of residential, administrative, industrial and commercial facilities in accordance with project requirements and existing standards.

renovation.title: Repair and reconstruction works
renovation.description: Professional solutions for major repairs, reconstruction and functional improvement of existing facilities.

engineering_systems.title: Engineering and communication systems
engineering_systems.description: Installation and technical support of electrical, water-sewage, heating, ventilation and other engineering systems.

it_supply.title: IT equipment supply and software
it_supply.description: Comprehensive services for supply, installation and implementation of modern IT equipment and software.

materials_supply.title: Construction materials and equipment supply
materials_supply.description: Supply and logistics of quality and certified construction materials and technical equipment.

project_management.title: Project management
project_management.description: Planning, coordination, control and timely execution of construction processes.

services.process_subtitle: The steps we follow to successfully deliver your project

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Reliable construction and installation services since 2013
about.description: "TEXNO CONSTRUCTION AZ" MMC was established on July 26, 2013. The company operates under the appropriate license. The construction and installation license was issued on May 22, 2024 (License No. EL-425/2024). "TEXNO CONSTRUCTION AZ" MMC is a professional company providing all types of services in the construction and installation sector.
about.feature_license: License No. EL-425/2024 for construction and installation
about.feature_team: Engineering and technical team with extensive experience
about.feature_portfolio: Company portfolio includes state facilities as well as a number of private projects
about.feature_weps: Commitment to women's empowerment and gender equality (WEPs)
about.story_paragraph: In a short period, our company has become one of the reputable and trusted companies in the construction sector. This success has been achieved mainly through the application of innovative approaches, the dedication of our professional team, and our competitive business strategy. Executing projects safely, with high quality and within the set timeframe strengthens our clients' trust in us.
about.mission_p1: "TEXNO CONSTRUCTION AZ" MMC has believed since its inception that economic and technical development should not be limited to project execution alone, but must also align with society's social values, safety culture, and sustainable development principles.
about.mission_p2: Using modern technologies, innovative approaches, and professional management in the projects we implement in the construction, installation, and supply sector, we create reliable, high-quality, and long-term value. As a company, our goal is to contribute to our country's infrastructure development by building safe, functional, and high-standard facilities, and to pass these values on to future generations.
about.values_subtitle: The values that form the foundation of our success

values.title: Technical Safety
values.description: We consider the safety of employees and facilities at all stages of work processes as our top priority.

values.title: Quality
values.description: Quality is the fundamental principle of our operations and the main reason for our trusted position in the market.

values.title: Professionalism
values.description: We remain committed to our obligations and deliver projects on time and flawlessly. With our highly qualified engineering and technical team, we execute projects in accordance with international standards.

features: Company portfolio includes state facilities as well as a number of private projects
Engineering and craftsman team with extensive experience

projects.title: Our Activities
projects.subtitle: Examples of our projects and works

descriptions.azerisiq_short: Supply of current measuring devices for power lines, electrical panels and power transformers
descriptions.media_center_short: Preparation of filming locations and installation of electrical lines for film production
descriptions.olive_garden_short: Supply of materials prepared for tingilər

extended.toplan: Organization of awareness events related to animals brought to the Toplan Stray Animal Care Center, conducting training for staff, maintenance of statistical database, and performance of current repair work.
extended.cop29: Construction and furnishing of the COP29 Information Center within the framework of the COP29 international event.
extended.pmd: Supply of IT equipment and provision of software services for the "Zafar Museum" project.
extended.azerisiq: Provision and supply of current measuring devices for electrical power lines, electrical panels and power transformers.
extended.media_center: Preparation of plans for filming locations, construction of filming platforms with metal structures, and installation of electrical lines for film production.
extended.olive_garden: Supply of materials prepared for tingilər.

cta.title: Contact Us For Your Project
cta.subtitle: Contact us to get professional and reliable construction solutions for your projects. Our team is ready to respond to your inquiries promptly.

footer.description: TEXNO CONSTRUCTION AZ MMC – implementing your projects with professional construction and installation services.
